metadata.description: Azure region for Azure OpenAI (requires eastus/eastus2/swedencentral for gpt-4o-mini)
Custom domain for the Static Web App (e.g. munchhatmap.dotheneedful.dev) — leave empty to skip
Discord OAuth2 application Client ID (from Discord Developer Portal → OAuth2)
Discord guild ID for membership verification
Discord role ID that grants elevated (MOD) permissions on the map
Seed placeholder secrets on first deploy only
Add this token to GitHub Actions secret: AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN
